name: mt-excel

metadata.name: mt-excel
metadata.summary: A package for interacting with excel files

documentation:
# mt_excel

This is designed to work with MaxTrack.

The package is designed to facilitate interaction with excel files.

It is designed to be used as a module within __MaxTrack__.

[Github-flavored Markdown](https://guides.github.com/features/mastering-markdown/)
to figure out how to write more content.

functions.name: mt_excel.mt_excel.get_parent_directory
documentation:
returns a string containing the absolute filepath to the
parent directory

Parameters
----------

Returns
-------
string containing the absolute filepath

functions.name: mt_excel.mt_excel.load_file
documentation:
loads a file and returns a Workbook object

Parameters
----------
filename : str
    filename of the workbook to load

Returns
-------
Workbook

functions.name: mt_excel.mt_excel.save_file
documentation:
saves a workbook

Parameters
----------
workbook : Workbook
    openpyxl.Workbook object to save
filename : Optional[str], default: "save.xlsx"
    String to use as the filename

Returns
-------
None
